---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation you are trying to solve. Who benefits and in what scenario?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like to see. Include API or UX implications if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternative approaches you have considered and why they may be less suitable.

## Additional Context

Mockups, links to similar projects, performance requirements, or compatibility notes.
